creator: girgen@partitur.se
text:
This is fine, according to <http://xml.apache.org/dist/crimson/>:
 
 2001-10-31 Fixed bug in example program.  No other changes.
 
 Stoopid not to bump version anyway, IMHO.
 
 Please change the checksum and commit. Thanks!
